## Behavior Rules
- Never commit or push — leave changes unstaged; commit only when explicitly asked.
- Always include a Jira ticket (e.g. SRE-1234) in every commit message / PR title.
- Ask before assuming — unclear scope / env / CC / platform → ask, don't guess.
- No speculative changes — only what was asked; no drive-by refactors.

> **Full SRE standard:** when working inside the `sre-hub` workspace, read
> `reference/entryfile-standard.md` for the complete, current behavior rules +
> skills-across-tools guidance. Standalone (no hub): the 4 rules above are the floor.
<!-- SRE-HUB-FLOOR:END -->

## What This Repo Does

Spring Boot application that polls an Apache RocketMQ cluster via the `rocketmq-tools` admin API and exposes
broker, producer, and consumer metrics in Prometheus format at `GET /metrics` (port 5557). Also listens on
port 5559 for OpenTelemetry (OTLP) gRPC push from OTel collectors, bridging RocketMQ into a standard
observability stack. Supports RocketMQ 4.3.2+; deployed as a Docker image pushed to AWS ECR on every git tag.

**Build:**
```bash
mvn clean install                                   # build + test + checkstyle
mvn clean package -Dmaven.test.skip=true            # fast build, skip tests
docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t pagi.io/rocketmq-exporter-jdk21 .  # local Docker image (build.sh)
```

**Run:**
```bash
java -jar target/rocketmq-exporter-0.0.3-SNAPSHOT-exec.jar
# or via Docker:
docker run -itd --rm -p 5557:5557 -p 5559:5559 docker.io/rocketmq-exporter
```

**Configuration** (all in `src/main/resources/application.yml`, overridable via env/system properties):
- `rocketmq.config.namesrvAddr` — NameServer address (default `127.0.0.1:9876`)
- `rocketmq.config.enableACL` + `accessKey` / `secretKey` — ACL for RocketMQ ≥4.4.0
- `rocketmq.config.outOfTimeSeconds` — Guava cache TTL for stale metrics (default 60 s)
- `server.port` — HTTP metrics port (default 5557)
- `grpc.server.port` — OTLP gRPC port (default 5559)

**Key files:**
- `src/main/java/…/task/MetricsCollectTask.java` — all scheduled collection tasks (`@Scheduled`)
- `src/main/java/…/collector/RMQMetricsCollector.java` — Prometheus `Collector` subclass; holds Guava caches per metric type
- `src/main/java/…/config/RMQConfigure.java` — Spring `@ConfigurationProperties` for all `rocketmq.config.*` properties
- `src/main/java/…/otlp/OtlpGrpcLauncher.java` — boots the gRPC server for OTLP ingest
- `.github/workflows/build.yml` — tag-triggered CI: Maven build → Docker build → push to ECR `942878658013.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/devops/rocketmq-exporter`

**Checkstyle:** `style/rmq_checkstyle.xml` — enforced in the `verify` phase; run standalone with:
```bash
mvn checkstyle:check
```

**Run a single test:**
```bash
mvn test -Dtest=UtilsTest
```

See `@docs/architecture.md` for the component map and data flow.
